headline: Prosus Sells Delivery Hero Stake At 22% Premium As Aspex Pressure Builds
summary: Prosus NV (PROSY) is moving to cut its exposure to Delivery Hero SE (DELHY) again, selling a 5% stake to Aspex Management in a deal that could sharpen investor attention on the German e-commerce firm's asset-sale strategy.  The transaction is set at 22 a share, giving Prosus about 335 million, with the price representing a 22% premium to Delivery Hero's 30-day volume weighted average price.  The sale also comes at a higher level than Prosus's April transaction with Uber Technologies (NYSE:UBER), when it sold a 4.5% stake at a price that was about 10% lower than the latest deal.

headline: Uber Expands Ulta And Expedia Partnerships As Valuation Debate Persists
summary: Uber Technologies (NYSE:UBER) has added more than 1,500 Ulta Beauty stores to Uber Eats for nationwide on-demand beauty and wellness delivery. The company has also expanded in-app hotel booking options through its partnership with Expedia, deepening its presence in travel services. These moves extend Uber's platform beyond ride-hailing and food delivery into retail and trip planning. Uber Technologies, trading at $75.45, is pushing further into retail and travel as it looks beyond its core...
